response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally talented software engineer with proven technical leadership, strong architectural instincts, and a track record of shipping and scaling complex systems. However, he does not meet the core technical requirements for this role. The position explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming experience; his resume shows approximately 6 months of professional C++ work at National Instruments with no engagement in the past decade. While he has distributed systems and infrastructure experience, he lacks the production cloud compute platform architecture expertise and cloud engineering team leadership central to this role. His career trajectory over the past 5+ years has shifted toward product engineering and high-level languages (TypeScript/Node.js), away from systems programming.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership at Staff level with strong mentoring ability, establishing engineering practices, and guiding architectural decisions across organizations
Proven track record designing and shipping large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests, with disciplined testing practices
Versatile engineer with deep full-stack capabilities and experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: 6 months professional work versus required 8 years, with no recent engagement with the language
Lacks production cloud compute platform architecture experience and leadership of cloud/DevOps engineering teams
Career trajectory shifted toward product engineering and high-level languages, away from systems programming and platform infrastructure work
